Incident: Jumped only fairly. Sent for sampling post-race.

Approaching the 1200 Metres raced keenly when it was steadied to avoid SERAPH GABRIEL. Between the 500 Metres and the 350 Metres made contact with SERAPH GABRIEL on a number of occasions as it prevented SERAPH GABRIEL from shifting out.
Raced wide and without cover for the majority of the event.

Between the 500 Metres and the 350 Metres made contact with AWESOME FLUKE on a number of occasions when it endeavoured to obtain clear running to the outside of SWORD POINT. Near the 350 Metres SERAPH GABRIEL was disappointed for clear running and then was held up until near the 250 Metres. After being shifted to the inside of SWORD POINT passing the 250 Metres to obtain clear running then raced tight to the inside of SWORD POINT until near the 100 Metres.

Jumped only fairly. From a wide barrier was shifted across behind runners in the early stages. Near the 200 Metres Y L Chung dropped his whip. A veterinary inspection immediately following the race did not show any significant findings.
Approaching the 450 Metres was held up for clear running behind VOYAGE SAMURAI as that runner commenced to give ground.

Jumped only fairly. Z Purton stated that his mount raced too keenly during the race and as a result was left without a finishing effort in the Home Straight. A veterinary inspection immediately following the race did not show any significant findings. Sent for sampling post-race.
Near the 350 Metres was steadied to avoid NEW FOREST which was giving ground.

A veterinary inspection immediately following the race which included an endoscopic examination showed a substantial amount of blood in the horse’s trachea. Before being allowed to race again, VOYAGE SAMURAI will be subjected to an official veterinary examination.

The performance of NEW FOREST, which finished tailed out, was considered unacceptable. Before being allowed to race again, NEW FOREST will be required to perform to the satisfaction of the Stewards in a barrier trial and be subjected to an official veterinary examination. A veterinary inspection immediately following the race did not show any significant findings.
